news.title: Japan core inflation accelerates after five months as Iran war pushes energy prices higher
news.title_cn: 由於伊朗戰爭推高能源價格，日本核心通膨在五個月後加速
news.summary: Government data showed the inflation figure — which strips out prices of fresh food — was in line with the 1.8% expected by economists polled by Reuters.

news.title: Dow CEO says clearing the Strait of Hormuz logjam will take almost a year
news.title_cn: Dow CEO says clearing the Strait of Hormuz logjam will take almost a year.陶氏化學首席執行官吉姆·菲特林表示，清除霍爾木茲海峽的干擾將比投資者預期的時間長得多
news.summary: Dow CEO Jim Fitterling said that clearing the disruption in the Strait of Hormuz will take significantly longer than investors expect.

news.title: How the Iran war has stoked competition between India and China for Russian oil
news.title_cn: 伊朗戰爭如何加劇了印度和中國對俄羅斯石油的競爭
news.summary: As the Iran war drags on and the Strait of Hormuz stays shut, India and China are increasingly competing against each other for shrinking crude oil supplies.
